_comment_purpose: Parallel model for Edict.Kafka.Tests. Mirrors Edict.Azure.Tests / Edict.Postgres.Tests: assembly-shared Kafka + Azurite + Postgres testcontainers, per-fixture per-collection cluster isolation. Cluster fixtures run serially within the assembly because the Kafka × Postgres / Kafka × Azure mix-and-match doubles the cluster-fixture count and Orleans' silo-gateway initialisation races under that pressure on a single host.
